rows.label: tlk70000050_03_msg0001
rows.name:
I hope you know I'm always
grateful to have your help!

rows.label: tlk70000050_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Thanks to you, the militia has grown,
but, well, that also means our food
problems have gotten worse...

rows.label: tlk70000050_03_msg0003
rows.name:
We're trying as hard as we can to be
self-sufficient, but it's just been
hard with everything else going on.

rows.label: tlk70000050_03_msg0004
rows.name:
If this keeps up, I'm getting
worried about our reserves.

rows.label: tlk70000050_03_msg0005
rows.name:
I won't be able to snack... Ah,
that was nothing! Nothing at all!
